Video.summary: Frankly my dear, guest star Richard Chamberlain gives it his all in "Gone With The Breeze".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Image.alt: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features another installment of "The Family", and Tim Conway's "World's Oldest Man".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Steve Lawrence star. Featuring the movie spoof "Operation Minestrone" & "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns as Carol's guest, highlighted by a dual role in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Dionne Warwick

Video.summary: Alan Alda stars! This episode features Alda as a department store Santa, and as Eunice's brother Larry.
Video.title: Alan Alda

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin dazzles with his famous impressions, then joins up with Lana Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Tim Conway's engagement ring for Carol, made from the cursed Hope Diamond, causes no end of bad luck.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shani Wallis, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway plays a prison warden responding to a riot, and a suitor whose test reaction causes havoc.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Sketches include an escaped convict seeking refuge in a diner, plus Carol and Vicki as robots.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Paul Sand and Eydie Gorme guest star in a salute to movie series such as "Dr. Kildaire".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Kaye Stevens and Audrey Meadows guest star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns" and the "10th Avenue Family."
Video.title: Kaye Stevens, Audrey Meadows

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests! Jim appears in a spoof of "Mary Hartman, Mary Hartman." Also: Tim tries to get some sleep.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: A meeting between incoming and outgoing First Ladies, an awkward audition, and the movie spoof "Kids Town."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Guests Rich Little & Eydie Gorme join in a tribute to Alfred Hitchcock! Also: Carol and Harvey play a couple.
Video.title: Rich Little, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Tim Conway guest stars as a hapless bus boy at a "Beniha-ha" restaurant who steps into an absent chef's role.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers browsing waterbeds.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca take part in a fairy tale musical extravaganza.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Tim and Carol are conventioneers double booked in a hotel room.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Edie Adams, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Hal Linden takes a leave from the 12th Precinct to cut it up with Carol & company!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Hal Linden

Video.summary: Jim Nabors and Alice Ghostley guest! Alice is Roger's sister in "Carol & Sis", and Jim has an unusual date.
Video.title: Alice Ghostley, Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for a sketch where a betrothed couple elect to paint their future home-with messy results.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray returns! Sketches include Carol and Nanette as precocious kids, and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Guest Richard Chamberlain stars in "Gone With The Breeze". In "Carol & Sis", it's one sibling too many.
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Paul Lynde guests as a real estate man. Also: The 10th Avenue Family & a performance from Carol's Charwoman.
Video.title: Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Mae East returns to "V.I.P.", a Presidential "Fireside Chat", and a case of laryngitis on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Eydie Gorme & Tim Conway guest, with Tim in a spy spoof "Dr. Nose." Eydie leads a number about a baby.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features Ruth Buzzi & Richard Crenna, who appear in a salute to "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball takes his secretary Mrs. Wiggins to lunch. Also: Harvey & Carol pick up on each other in a bar.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry and Totie Fields drop by to take part in "Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: Vincent Price & Joan Rivers star! Vincent crosses paths with Alice Portnoy, then appears in "The Walnuts."
Video.title: Vincent Price, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Features the best variety show ensemble on TV with "The Doily Sisters," about twin Vaudeville performers.
Video.title: Family Show
